scripts.clean:reports: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('reports', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').mkdirSync('reports', { recursive: true });require('fs').mkdirSync('reports/allure-results', { recursive: true });"
scripts.report: allure generate reports/allure-results --clean -o reports/allure-report && allure open reports/allure-report
scripts.test:allure: pnpm clean:reports && pnpm test && pnpm report
